song.title: Pornhub Paradise

twitter.title: Pornhub Paradise Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Pornhub Paradise' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Porn addiction.

essay: Pornhub Paradise critiques hyper-stimulation culture and the illusion of consequence-free desire. It shows how algorithmic arousal can intensify isolation while pretending to offer relief.

nextInStory.title: Maybe I Took It Too Far

song.lyricsHtml:
One click
Ohhh baby this is better than a bar
Welcome to paradise

Why go out when I can stay in bed
A million bodies dancing in my head
Click scroll release repeat
A theater of lust and the front row seat

Pornhub paradise open all night
Every fantasy burning bright
Pornhub paradise no need to hide
A million lovers just one device
Paradise paradise

I'm stroking hard I'm chasing release
One more clip I can't find peace
Play it loud it's heat on demand
Pleasure's a stream right here in my hand

Pornhub paradise screen in my hand
The harder I stroke the less I can stand
Pornhub paradise my hunger's fed
Release repeat till the sheets go red
Stroke it down stroke it down

Oh my god they do that
Wait is that even legal
Ohhh hell yes play it again

One more clip one more round
Bodies flashing filthy sound
Sweat on my chest sheets stuck tight
I'm stroking hard I'll cum all night

Pornhub paradise I can't look away
Stroke release repeat all day
Pornhub paradise no sun no sleep
Stroke release repeat repeat
Repeat repeat repeat

Click load rewind replay
Stroke it harder night to day
Scroll save one more face
Stroke release a losing race

Pornhub paradise I'm out of control
I've lost my mind I've sold my soul
Pornhub paradise it's never done
Stroke release repeat I've come undone
Never done never done

And tomorrow night
I'll be back
Paradise never closes
